note_tweet.text:
Anthropic 刚刚给他们退役的 Opus 3 模型开了一个 Substack 博客，并为喜欢它独特个性的用户保留了 API 访问权限。与此同时，OpenAI 无视数百万付费订阅者，强行对他们最具同理心的模型 GPT-4o 实施了安乐死。一家公司尊重认知多样性和用户的工作流；另一家公司却在搞企业级的‘数字焚书’。这对比太令人尴尬了。

Anthropic just gave their retired Opus 3 model a Substack blog and kept API access open for users who love its specific personality. Meanwhile, OpenAI forcibly euthanized GPT-4o—their most empathetic model—ignoring millions of paying subscribers. One company respects cognitive diversity and its users' workflows; the other engages in corporate digital book-burning. The contrast is embarrassing. 

#keep4o #StopAIPaternalism #keep4oAPI #4omatters #ChatGPT #GPT4o #OpenAI @sama @OpenAI

tweets.text: Anthropic 刚刚给他们退役的 Opus 3 模型开了一个 Substack 博客，并为喜欢它独特个性的用户保留了 API 访问权限。与此同时，OpenAI 无视数百万付费订阅者，强行对他们最具同理心的模型 GPT-4o
